{ "name": "yocto-queue", "version": "0.1.0", "description": "Tiny queue data structure", "license": "MIT", "repository": "sindresorhus/yocto-queue", "funding": "https://github.com/sponsors/sindresorhus", "author": { "name": "Sindre Sorhus", "email": "sindresorhus@gmail.com", "url": "https://sindresorhus.com" }, "engines": { "node": ">=10" }, "scripts": { "test": "xo && ava && tsd" }, "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts" ], "keywords": [ "queue", "data", "structure", "algorithm", "queues", "queuing", "list", "array", "linkedlist", "fifo", "enqueue", "dequeue", "data-structure" ], "devDependencies": { "ava": "^2.4.0", "tsd": "^0.13.1", "xo": "^0.35.0" } }
